decisions.paper_scoped: state.theorems absent/empty -> paper-scoped preamble inert; no theorem_local_id manifest emitted.
decisions.certified_kernel: The formalizable-now kernel is the all-beta two-point lower floor plus the two regime theorems and the bracket lemma; nothing certified depends on the upper-route cluster.
decisions.upper_route_deferred: The 9-node Bonvini-Kennedy/HOIF upper-route cluster (source lemmas + scope caveats + external-comparator lemmas) is Defer-tier substrate-gate: it needs higher-order-influence-function projection-risk theory, series/sieve L2 rate theory, and classical local-polynomial interior bias/variance, none present in Causalean; it feeds no certified theorem, so deferring it does not vacate the kernel.
decisions.oeq_as_prop: oeq:full-beta-frontier is the note's acknowledged open residual (design d0_open_oeq_residuals) -> mapped to a named Prop def stating the residual question, never a theorem; defer_tier false; depended-on by nothing.
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt18: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT: ass:no-unmeasured-confounding now requires measurability of every fixed-dose potential-outcome map before its bounded-test conditional-expectation identities; Y(a) is structurally indexed by the subtype a in [0,1]; HolderBall1D/HolderBallND require ContDiffOn through floor(order); betaFrontierHandle universally quantifies beta with 0<beta; sym:O support clauses each carry direct @realizes O tags; and rho_n is backed by a structurally nonnegative NNReal companion with the exact public real formula. The smooth-covariate theorem inherits the corrected HolderDoseClass without a signature change. The DoseLaw field retyping forced only the doseWitness constructor to restrict its existing real-indexed witness process to the subtype. No disposition, target_file, lean_kind, or theorem-manifest change.
decisions.scaffold_redirect_lowerfloor_trichotomy_: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, lower-floor/open-trichotomy directive): minimal-diff fix of the one flagged drift -- the oeq Prop fullBetaFrontierResidual (Frontier.lean, node oeq:full-beta-frontier) MECHANICALLY NARROWED the note's open trichotomy to a SINGLE branch (rho_n upper bound: handle AND (exists C, R_n <= C*rho_n)) and asserted the betaFrontierHandle lower floor UNCONDITIONALLY (the note delivers it only under ass:baseline-submodel-slack). FIX (faithful, ADD the dropped condition + restore the disjunction): (A) conditioned the whole Prop on BaselineSubmodelSlack d beta s M c0 eps0 t0 -> (handle AND trichotomy), so the handle is no longer unconditional. (B) replaced the single rho_n-upper-branch second conjunct with the note's three-way DISJUNCTION exactly as stated in oeq:full-beta-frontier ('an upper bound of order rho_n, an intermediate exponent, or a genuinely beta-sensitive phase'): (i) exists C>0, eventually R_n <= C*rho_n (rho_n attainable); (ii) exists kappa C, deficient-rho_n exponent 2/(1+d/(4s)+1/alpha) < kappa < oracle floor exponent 2alpha/(2alpha+1) and eventually R_n <= C*n^{-kappa} (intermediate exponent); (iii) exists beta1<>beta2>0, kappa1<>kappa2, two-sided minimax rates n^{-kappa_i} for the class at beta_i (beta a genuine hardness parameter). Branches are the note's stated alternatives (not invented). No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; node remains lean_kind def (an oeq Prop, never proved, no sorry, depended-on by nothing). sym:A / sym:X: the two IidSampling support conjuncts (A in [0,1], X in [0,1]^d a.s.) -- previously BOTH tagged only `@realizes O` so the per-coordinate range space was uncredited -- are now primary-tagged `@realizes A` and `@realizes X` respectively (the enforcing predicates pinning each coordinate to its declared range), with the DoseObs structure `@realizes O` docstring updated to reference those per-coordinate conjuncts for O's joint support. prop:oracle-regime-reduction (listed in the directive) was already faithful -- conditional on hslack, conclusion = rho_n collapse AND lower floor, no narrowing -- so left byte-for-byte per minimal-diff. betaFrontierHandle (def:beta-frontier-handle, not in edit list) unchanged. Frontier.lean and Basic.lean rebuild clean (lake build, 2876 jobs, only pre-existing crux-construction sorries in Witness/TwoPointConstruction + long-line style warnings).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt2: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention): the upper-route source lemmas were de-tautologized in place. local-polynomial-window-source / series-sieve-l2-source / hoif-projection-risk-source / hoif-remainder-product-source now bind the note's STATED regularity inputs (a concrete eta/s-Holder regression function or nuisance, kernel order/support/vanishing-moment conditions, the sieve approximation property, design lower/upper bound, bounded second moment, and the m+1 nuisance-error product family) and conclude rate bounds on CONCRETE functionals (kernelSmoothingBias, l2sqCube, the sum-of-products remainder), removing the free-variable bound-hypothesis re-add. truncation-reciprocal-lipschitz gains the note's truncation-nonexpansiveness clause. The scope caveats bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates / localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition gain the note's explicit WINDOWED x-regularity hypotheses (HolderBallND of mu/pi for every a in the window, strictly stronger than the slice-only class members); hoif-order-remainder-negligible now states negligibility of the concrete sum-of-products remainder. sym:O/A/X: the observed-unit support A in [0,1], X in [0,1]^d is pinned a.s. via two new conjuncts in IidSampling (HolderDoseClass member count unchanged). ass:no-unmeasured-confounding: the dose a is restricted to [0,1] (note range), not all of R. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind / node-hyps changes; all bodies remain sorry.
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt3: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 3): minimal-diff de-tautologization of the one remaining defective source lemma. hoif-projection-risk-source previously stated two REFLEXIVE conjuncts (J^{-4s/d} <= C*J^{-4s/d} and J/(nh)^2 <= C*J/(nh)^2 -- the tautological-predicate trap, true with C=1 and carrying no content). Both are now concrete non-reflexive proxy bounds tied to the note's STATED bound constants: the projection product bias^2 conjunct is (M*J^{-2s/d})^2 <= C*J^{-4s/d} (the square of the product of the two s-Holder covariate sieve-approximation errors of size M*J^{-s/d} from the stated Holder radius M; requires C >= M^2), and the degenerate U-statistic variance conjunct is J*sigma2/(nh)^2 <= C*(J/(nh)^2) (the sigma2-scaled variance proxy; requires C >= sigma2). This matches the proxy convention already used for the stochastic terms of local-polynomial-window-source and series-sieve-l2-source (LHS = concrete proxy in M / sigma2, RHS = target rate), avoids the forbidden free-variable bound-hypothesis re-add (no new free hyp bounding the answer), and is the strongest faithful form achievable without the absent local-polynomial / sieve / HOIF estimator-risk infrastructure (I-1..I-3). No disposition / target_file / lean_kind / node-hyps change; body remains sorry. All other 7 redirect targets unchanged from attempt 2 (already bind stated inputs + concrete functionals).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt5: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 5): the seven upper-route source/scope lemmas were re-stated at the ESTIMATOR LEVEL (the prior attempts' deterministic/proxy rate inequalities were re-flagged as not estimator-level). UpperRouteSource.lean gains five shared noncomputable estimator-risk functionals over the i.i.d. n-sample law (sampleLaw, estimatorBias, estimatorStochL2, estimatorMSE, estimatorPredictionL2 = sampleLaw-averaged L2 risk). local-polynomial-window-source: conclusion now asserts a local-polynomial estimator family est N h (and J-coef variant estCoef N h J), measurable, attaining |estimatorBias|<=Cbias*h^eta and estimatorStochL2<=Cvar*(Nh)^{-1/2} (resp. Cvar*sqrt(J/(Nh))) UNIFORMLY over every per-draw law mu whose A-regression cond-exp equals the eta-Holder f and whose Y has 2nd moment <= sigma2 (estimator quantified OUTSIDE mu => non-vacuous, can't be const f(t)). series-sieve-l2-source: a least-squares series estimator est N L (function-valued, measurable) with estimatorPredictionL2 mu (est N L) f <= Cstoch*(L^{-s/d}+sqrt(L/N)) uniformly over laws whose X-regression equals the s-Holder f; deterministic best-approx kept. hoif-projection-risk-source: a cross-fitted order-m HOIF estimator est n h J with estimatorMSE P (est) (thetaFunctional P t0) <= C*(h^{2alpha}+(nh)^{-1}+J^{-4s/d}+J/(nh)^2) over dose laws P with treatment alpha-Holder + windowed covariate s-Holder nuisances. hoif-remainder-product-source: an HOIF estimator est whose estimatorBias against thetaFunctional EQUALS the sum-of-products of m+1 genuine nuisance-estimator L2 errors (estimatorPredictionL2 of nuHat vs nu), hence squared <= C*delta^{2(m+1)}. UpperRouteScope.lean: bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates -> pilot estimators estMu/estPi with estimatorPredictionL2 <= C*(h^alpha|h^beta + L^{-s/d} + sqrt(L/(nh))) under windowed regularity; localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition -> estimatorMSE four-term bound under windowed regularity; hoif-order-remainder-negligible -> the per-n HOIF estimator bias (= nuisance-error product remainder) is eventually <= rho_n. The two external comparators (same-class-hoif-upper-smooth/deficient) and truncation-reciprocal-lipschitz are unchanged byte-for-byte. Added `open MeasureTheory` to UpperRouteScope. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; node hyps gained the estimator objects + per-law regularity/regression-link hypotheses the estimator-level statement requires (faithful, not invented). All bodies remain sorry; both changed files compile sorry-only. Helper defs estimator{Bias,StochL2,MSE,PredictionL2}/sampleLaw added to UpperRouteSource (kernelSmoothingBias/l2sqCube retained).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt6: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 6): minimal-diff fix of the one flagged drift -- local-polynomial-window-source DROPPED the note's law-side local design-density bounds by leaving cDesign/CDesign as dangling outer reals never attached to the per-draw law mu. The note states 'the design density is locally bounded above and below at t'; this is a LAW-SIDE condition on mu (the A-marginal design density), not a free constant. FIX: added a per-mu hypothesis inside the uniform-over-mu block requiring the A-marginal mu.map (.A), restricted to the window [t-rnbhd,t+rnbhd], to equal volume.withDensity (ENNReal.ofReal (pA .)) there for some measurable pA with cDesign <= pA a <= CDesign on the window -- so cDesign/CDesign are now genuinely attached to mu as the local lower/upper design-density bounds the note states. Docstring updated to reflect-back. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; the plan node-hyps field is unchanged (the per-mu design-density condition is an inline conjunct of the existential conclusion's uniform block, not an assumption-def/class hyp). Body remains sorry; file compiles sorry-only. All other 7 redirect targets unchanged byte-for-byte (their law-side bounds -- sigma2 via a.s. Y^2 bound, windowed Holder nuisances, nuisance-error products -- were already attached to their per-law mu/P).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt7: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 7): minimal-diff fix of three remaining drifts where the Lean realized weaker/different statements than the note. (1) BOUNDED SECOND MOMENT: local-polynomial-window-source, series-sieve-l2-source and hoif-projection-risk-source stated the outcome-regularity input as an a.s. bound (∀ᵐ O ∂μ, O.Y^2 ≤ sigma2) -- the note states 'bounded second moment', so all three were changed to the integral form ∫ O, O.Y^2 ∂μ ≤ sigma2 (resp. ∂P.dataMeasure). (2) MISSING DENSITY-ESTIMATION RATE: series-sieve-l2-source omitted the note's 'same rate applies to projection density estimation in L2 for an s-Holder density bounded by a finite envelope'; added a second function-valued estimator estDens (measurable) and a uniform-over-law density block: for every μ whose X-marginal on the cube has an s-Holder Lebesgue density g with 0<=g<=M, estimatorPredictionL2 μ (estDens N L) g <= Cstoch*(L^{-s/d}+sqrt(L/N)), with g pinned to μ by μ.map(.X)|cube = volume.withDensity(ENNReal.ofReal g)|cube. (3) EXISTENTIAL -> ORDER-m CROSS-FITTED PROJECTION-HOIF ESTIMATOR: added a new predicate IsOrderMUStatistic m est (UpperRouteSource) := est is a degree-(m+1) symmetric V-statistic, ∃ kernel G, est s = (n^{m+1})⁻¹ ∑_{t:Fin(m+1)→Fin n} G (s∘t); pins the bare existential measurable estimator to the order-m HOIF U/V-statistic form. Applied: hoif-projection-risk-source gains order param m + (∀ n h J, IsOrderMUStatistic m (est n h J)); hoif-remainder-product-source gains IsOrderMUStatistic m est; localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition gains m + IsOrderMUStatistic m + the bounded-2nd-moment thread; bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates gains the bounded-2nd-moment thread (sigma2 input + ∫Y^2≤sigma2 per P) its underlying local-poly/sieve sources require; hoif-order-remainder-negligible gains hyp hcf : ∀ n, IsOrderMUStatistic m (est n). Docstrings reflect-back. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; node-hyps fields unchanged (added items are inline lemma-signature parameters/conjuncts, not assumption-def/class hyps). All bodies remain sorry; both UpperRouteSource and UpperRouteScope compile sorry-only and the full downstream closure rebuilds clean (no broken call sites; these deferred lemmas feed no certified theorem). The two external comparators (same-class-hoif-upper-smooth/deficient) and truncation-reciprocal-lipschitz are unchanged byte-for-byte.
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt8: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 8): minimal-diff fix of the remaining drift -- the local-polynomial and series/sieve LS-ridge source estimators were still bare estimator-EXISTENCE statements (∃ est, Measurable est ∧ rate) with no structural pin to the NAMED estimator class, weaker/different from the note's named local-polynomial and bounded series/sieve LS-ridge source results (the HOIF sources were already pinned via IsOrderMUStatistic in attempt 7). FIX: added two structural-form predicates to UpperRouteSource -- IsLinearSmoother est := ∃ w, est s = ∑ᵢ w(design) i * (s i).Y (response-weighted sum with design-only weights, the Fan-Gijbels equivalent-kernel/linear-smoother structure of the named local-polynomial estimator, ruling out outcome-free cheats like const f(t)); and IsSeriesRidgeEstimator est := ∃ w, est s x = ∑ᵢ w(design,x) i * (s i).Y (the least-squares sieve hat-matrix-row structure of the named bounded series/sieve LS-ridge estimator). Threaded: local-polynomial-window-source gains (∀ N h, IsLinearSmoother (est N h)) ∧ (∀ N h J, IsLinearSmoother (estCoef N h J)); series-sieve-l2-source gains (∀ N L, IsSeriesRidgeEstimator (est N L)) ∧ (∀ N L, IsSeriesRidgeEstimator (estDens N L)); bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates gains (∀ n h L, IsSeriesRidgeEstimator (estMu n h L)) ∧ (∀ n h L, IsSeriesRidgeEstimator (estPi n h L)). The HOIF source/scope lemmas (hoif-projection-risk-source, hoif-remainder-product-source, localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition, hoif-order-remainder-negligible) keep their IsOrderMUStatistic projection-HOIF U/V-statistic pin from attempt 7 (already the strongest honest structural form without the absent projection-basis infrastructure I-1), unchanged byte-for-byte; the two external comparators and truncation-reciprocal-lipschitz unchanged. Docstrings reflect-back. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; node-hyps fields unchanged (added items are inline conjuncts of the existential conclusions, not assumption-def/class hyps). All bodies remain sorry; both UpperRouteSource and UpperRouteScope rebuild sorry-only and the downstream closure is clean (these deferred lemmas feed no certified theorem).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt9: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 9): minimal-diff fix of the remaining drift -- the structural predicates added in attempts 7-8 (IsLinearSmoother, IsSeriesRidgeEstimator, IsOrderMUStatistic) were still WEAK GENERIC predicates (linear-in-Y with design-only/design-and-point weights; bare degree-(m+1) V-statistic with arbitrary kernel) rather than the NAMED local-polynomial / series-ridge / projection-HOIF estimator CLASSES the note states. FIX (UpperRouteSource): replaced/strengthened the predicates to encode each named estimator's DEFINING CONSTRUCTION. (1) IsLocalPolynomialEstimator K t h p est := est s = c 0 where c : Fin (p+1) -> R minimizes the kernel-weighted local SSE sum_i K((A_i-t)/h)(Y_i - sum_j c_j (A_i-t)^j)^2 (the Fan-Gijbels local weighted-least-squares intercept), replacing IsLinearSmoother in local-polynomial-window-source (degree p = floor eta). (2) IsSeriesRidgeEstimator phi L lam est strengthened to the ridge-penalised LS argmin: est s x = sum_{j<L} c_j phi_j(x) where c minimizes sum_i (Y_i - sum_{j<L} c_j phi_j(X_i))^2 + lam sum c_j^2; used in series-sieve-l2-source (basis phi L, lam>=0 existential) and bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates (new phi parameter, lam existential). (3) IsProjectionDensityEstimator phi L est := est s x = sum_{j<L} (N^{-1} sum_i phi_j(X_i)) phi_j(x) (empirical orthonormal-series projection density), NEW, for estDens in series-sieve-l2-source (replaces its IsSeriesRidgeEstimator use, which mis-pinned a covariate-only density to a Y-response estimator). (4) IsProjectionHOIFEstimator m J b est := exists tensor Lambda, est s = (n^{m+1})^{-1} sum_tau sum_kappa Lambda kappa * prod_i b(kappa i)(s(tau i)) -- the order-m projection MULTILINEAR V-statistic onto the J-dim covariate basis b (RLTvdV projected-influence-function contraction), strengthening the bare IsOrderMUStatistic; used in hoif-projection-risk-source, localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition (basis b : forall J, Fin J -> ...), and hoif-order-remainder-negligible (new J + b : forall n, Fin J -> ... parameters). IsOrderMUStatistic is RETAINED (defined) only for hoif-remainder-product-source (NOT in the edit list, unchanged byte-for-byte), where the estimator is additionally pinned by the genuine remainder identity bias = sum_k prod_j errors. The two external comparators (same-class-hoif-upper-smooth/deficient) and truncation-reciprocal-lipschitz unchanged byte-for-byte. Docstrings reflect-back. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; node-hyps fields unchanged (added items are inline lemma-signature parameters/conjuncts realizing the named estimator class -- the projection basis/sieve basis/kernel are structural inputs the note states, not invented rate hypotheses). All bodies remain sorry; both UpperRouteSource and UpperRouteScope rebuild sorry-only and the full downstream closure rebuilds clean (no broken call sites; these deferred lemmas feed no certified theorem).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt10: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 10): minimal-diff fix of the one remaining drift -- local-polynomial-window-source encoded its J-series-coefficient variant `estCoef` as a SCALAR J-INDEXED estimator ((Fin N -> DoseObs) -> R, indexed by a bare nat J) pinned to the SCALAR IsLocalPolynomialEstimator, whereas the note states 'J bounded series coefficients in x are estimated inside the same A-window, the stochastic coefficient contribution is O(sqrt(J/(Nh)))' -- a genuine J-DIMENSIONAL coefficient VECTOR contribution (the sqrt(J/(Nh)) rate is the aggregate L2 size of the whole Fin J -> R coefficient vector), not a scalar indexed by J. FIX (UpperRouteSource): (1) added estimatorStochL2Vec mu est := sqrt(E[sum_{j<J} (est_j - E[est_j])^2]) -- the Euclidean L2 size of the entire J-vector of series coefficients. (2) added IsLocalPolynomialCoefEstimator b K t h p est -- the named J-dimensional local-polynomial series-coefficient class: for each basis index j:Fin J, est s j is the intercept of the degree-p kernel-weighted local WLS fit (in A) of the j-th covariate-projected responses b j (X_i)*Y_i (one Fan-Gijbels local solve per series coefficient). (3) retyped estCoef : forall N, R -> forall J:nat, (Fin N -> DoseObs d) -> (Fin J -> R) (J-vector codomain), added existential basis b : forall J, Fin J -> (Fin d -> R) -> R, replaced its IsLocalPolynomialEstimator pin with IsLocalPolynomialCoefEstimator (b J), and replaced the scalar estimatorStochL2 (estCoef N h J) <= Cvar*sqrt(J/(Nh)) conclusion with estimatorStochL2Vec (estCoef N h J) <= Cvar*sqrt(J/(Nh)). The scalar local-polynomial estimator `est N h` (estimating the scalar f(t)) is unchanged -- legitimately scalar. The other 5 named edit targets (series-sieve-l2-source, hoif-projection-risk-source, bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates, localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition, hoif-order-remainder-negligible) ALREADY encode their J/L-dimensional coefficient contribution via IsSeriesRidgeEstimator (L coefficients c:nat->R on the sieve span) / IsProjectionDensityEstimator / IsProjectionHOIFEstimator (basis b : Fin J -> ..., coefficient tensor Lambda : (Fin (m+1) -> Fin J) -> R contracted over Fin J), so they carry no scalar-J-indexed drift and are unchanged byte-for-byte. Docstring of local-polynomial-window-source reflects-back. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; node-hyps unchanged (estCoef/b and their J-dim type/pin are inline parameters of the existential conclusion, not assumption-def/class hyps). All bodies remain sorry; UpperRouteSource compiles sorry-only and the full downstream closure (incl. UpperRouteScope) rebuilds clean (no broken call sites; these deferred lemmas feed no certified theorem).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt11: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 11): minimal-diff fix of the flagged drift -- the source-lemma estimator classes used UNCONSTRAINED EXISTENTIAL bases and OMITTED bounded / fixed-projection / cross-fitting conditions the note states. FIX (UpperRouteSource + UpperRouteScope). (A) CROSS-FITTING: strengthened the two HOIF estimator-class predicates from full V-statistic sums over ALL index tuples (Fin (m+1) -> Fin n) to CROSS-FITTED U-statistic sums over DISTINCT (injective) index tuples (Fin (m+1) ↪ Fin n) only -- IsOrderMUStatistic (consumed by hoif-remainder-product-source) and IsProjectionHOIFEstimator (consumed by hoif-projection-risk-source, localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition, hoif-order-remainder-negligible, and the two comparators); this realizes the note's 'cross-fitted order-m HOIF estimator' (the m+1 factors evaluated on disjoint observations, dropping the diagonal). (B) FIXED-PROJECTION: the covariate projection / series bases that were EXISTENTIALLY quantified inside the conclusion are now FIXED input PARAMETERS -- local-polynomial-window-source's series-coef basis b, hoif-projection-risk-source's projection basis b, and localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition's projection basis b moved out of the existential into the def signature (series-sieve-l2-source's phi, bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates's phi, and hoif-order-remainder-negligible's b were already parameters). (C) BOUNDED: added an envelope bound on every basis/regressor (Bbasis or Bphi : R, 0<Bbasis, and |b ...| <= Bbasis resp. |phi ...| <= Bphi) -- the note's 'J BOUNDED series coefficients', 'BOUNDED spline/wavelet/tensor-product sieve', 'bounded regressors'. Applied to local-polynomial-window-source, series-sieve-l2-source, hoif-projection-risk-source, bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates, localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition, hoif-order-remainder-negligible. (D) COMPARATORS (same-class-hoif-upper-smooth/deficient-covariates): the abstract free risk sequence R is now PINNED to the MSE of a cross-fitted bounded fixed-projection order-m projection-HOIF estimator via new params (m J, t0, P : N->DoseLaw, fixed bounded basis b/Bbasis, est, hcf : IsProjectionHOIFEstimator m J b (est n), hR : R n = estimatorMSE (P n) (est n) (thetaFunctional (P n) t0)); hUpper still asserts that risk attains the regime exponent, conclusion R <= C*rho_n unchanged -- so 'their HOIF estimator attains the exponent' is structurally realized, not merely named. hoif-remainder-product-source needed no signature param change (its IsOrderMUStatistic pin is now cross-fitted); truncation-reciprocal-lipschitz unchanged byte-for-byte. Docstrings reflect-back on all eight changed defs. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; node-hyps fields unchanged (added items are inline lemma-signature parameters/conjuncts -- bounded fixed projection bases and cross-fitting are structural inputs the note states, not invented rate hypotheses). All gate lemmas are Prop-valued defs (no proof bodies); both UpperRouteSource and UpperRouteScope rebuild clean and the full downstream closure rebuilds clean (no broken call sites; these deferred lemmas feed no certified theorem).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt12: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 2 of the kernel/covariate-basis directive): minimal-diff fix of two flagged drifts on the HOIF source/scope cluster -- the projection-HOIF estimator class OMITTED the note's localized kernel/bandwidth structure and allowed OBSERVATION-DEPENDENT (DoseObs d -> R) rather than COVARIATE-ONLY ((Fin d -> R) -> R) projection basis functions. FIX. (1) IsProjectionHOIFEstimator (UpperRouteSource): retyped basis b : Fin J -> DoseObs d -> R to b : Fin J -> (Fin d -> R) -> R (covariate-only), added kernel K : R->R and t0 h : R parameters, and rewrote the V-statistic body to (a) LOCALIZE each of the m+1 cross-fitted factors by the treatment-direction kernel weight (prod_i h^{-1} K((A_i-t0)/h)) at bandwidth h around t0 -- the note's localized kernel/bandwidth structure -- and (b) evaluate the projection basis at the COVARIATE only (b (kappa i) (s (t i)).X, not the full observation). (2) Added IsLocalizedSeriesRidgeEstimator (UpperRouteSource): the kernel-weighted (by K((A-t0)/h)) sieve LS-ridge pilot, realizing the note's 'localized pilot' so the bandwidth h in the rate h^alpha+L^{-s/d}+sqrt(L/(nh)) is carried in the estimator construction (the plain IsSeriesRidgeEstimator, used by the non-edit-listed series-sieve-l2-source for the GLOBAL covariate regression, is left unchanged). (3) Threaded the new K/t0/h params + covariate-only b through all six edit-listed consumers: hoif-projection-risk-source (b covariate-only, hb on x, pin IsProjectionHOIFEstimator m J K t0 h (b J)); localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition (added K param, b covariate-only, pin K t0 h); hoif-order-remainder-negligible (added Kern/h params -- K is already the Nat term-count there -- b covariate-only, pin Kern t0 h); same-class-hoif-upper-smooth/deficient-covariates (added K/h params, b covariate-only, pin K t0 h); bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates (added K param, pilot pin IsSeriesRidgeEstimator -> IsLocalizedSeriesRidgeEstimator ... K t0 h; its phi was already covariate-only). hoif-remainder-product-source (NOT in the edit list; uses IsOrderMUStatistic, no projection basis) and truncation-reciprocal-lipschitz and local-polynomial-window-source (its coef basis b was already covariate-only and IsLocalPolynomialEstimator already localized via K/t/h) are unchanged byte-for-byte. Docstrings reflect-back on every changed def. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; node-hyps fields unchanged (added items are inline lemma-signature parameters/conjuncts -- the localizing kernel/bandwidth and the covariate-only projection basis are structural inputs the note states, not invented rate hypotheses). All gate lemmas are Prop-valued defs (no proof bodies); both UpperRouteSource and UpperRouteScope rebuild clean and the full downstream closure rebuilds clean (no broken call sites; these deferred lemmas feed no certified theorem).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt13: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 3 of the kernel/covariate-basis directive): minimal-diff fix of two flagged drifts -- the Lean OMITTED the note-stated localized denominator-weight control and MIS-REALIZED the pi nuisance pilot estimator structure. FIX. (A) LOCALIZED DENOMINATOR-WEIGHT CONTROL (the 1/pi_P(A|X) IPW weight of the HOIF/IPW score, which the note states the windowed-nuisance source route requires): added the existing truncation_reciprocal_lipschitz control as an explicit per-law scope hypothesis to all six edit-listed targets. For lemmas whose law P is bound inside the uniform forall-block (hoif-projection-risk-source in UpperRouteSource; bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates, localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition in UpperRouteScope) added outer params (c0 C0 : R)(hc0 : 0<c0) and an inline antecedent 'forall (hpos : LocalPositivity P c0 t0 window), truncation_reciprocal_lipschitz P c0 t0 window C0 hc0 hpos ->' just after the windowed-pi Holder hypothesis. For lemmas with P : N->DoseLaw outer (hoif-order-remainder-negligible, same-class-hoif-upper-smooth/deficient-covariates) added params (eps0 c0 C0 : R)(hc0 : 0<c0) and outer hyps (hpos : forall n, LocalPositivity (P n) c0 t0 eps0)(hden : forall n, truncation_reciprocal_lipschitz (P n) c0 t0 eps0 C0 hc0 (hpos n)). (B) PI NUISANCE PILOT STRUCTURE: added IsLocalizedDensityRidgeEstimator (UpperRouteSource) -- the treatment-localized conditional-density sieve pilot that regresses the LOCALIZED TREATMENT KERNEL WEIGHT h^{-1} K((A-t0)/h) (a function of A alone, NO outcome Y) onto the covariate sieve span, the windowed-nuisance source route's density response; re-pinned bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates's estPi from IsLocalizedSeriesRidgeEstimator (a Y-response regression, correct only for the mu outcome-regression pilot estMu, which is unchanged) to IsLocalizedDensityRidgeEstimator. Docstrings reflect-back on all changed defs. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; node-hyps fields unchanged (added items are inline lemma-signature parameters/conjuncts -- the localized denominator-weight control and the conditional-density pilot structure are structural inputs the note states, not invented rate hypotheses). All gate lemmas are Prop-valued defs (no proof bodies); both UpperRouteSource and UpperRouteScope rebuild clean and the full downstream closure rebuilds clean (8129 jobs, no errors; no broken call sites; these deferred lemmas feed no certified theorem).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt14: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, attempt 4 of the kernel/covariate-basis directive): minimal-diff fix of two flagged drifts -- the upper-route projection-HOIF estimator was OUTCOME/NUISANCE-FREE (the windowed HOIF score the note requires) and the six edit-listed targets DROPPED the declared-class treatment-direction Holder hypotheses. FIX. (A) WINDOWED HOIF SCORE (outcome-free drift): the shared structural predicate IsProjectionHOIFEstimator (UpperRouteSource) -- consumed by hoif-projection-risk-source, localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition, hoif-order-remainder-negligible, and the two same-class comparators -- had a V-statistic kernel (prod_i h^{-1} K((A_i-t0)/h)) * sum_kappa Lambda_kappa prod_i b(kappa_i)(X_i) carrying NO outcome Y. BODY-ONLY change (no signature change, so no call site breaks): the kernel now multiplies in the leading cross-fit observation's OUTCOME (s (t 0)).Y, realizing the note's windowed HOIF score K_h(A-t0){Y-mu}/pi(A|X) -- the localized-outcome numerator Y * h^{-1} K((A-t0)/h) is the data leg, the Lambda-contracted covariate projection legs are the nuisance {.-mu}/pi correction -- so the estimator is genuinely outcome-DEPENDENT and cannot collapse to an outcome-free projection. Docstring of IsProjectionHOIFEstimator reflects-back. (B) DECLARED-CLASS TREATMENT-DIRECTION HOLDER (missing-Holder drift): added the declared-class smoothness members MuTreatmentHolder (order alpha) and PiTreatmentHolder (order beta) -- HolderDoseClass.muT/.piT -- to all six targets, threading beta/M params where absent. hoif-projection-risk-source (had MuTreatmentHolder, missing PiTreatmentHolder): added beta param + hbeta + 'PiTreatmentHolder P beta M t0 rnbhd ->' inside the per-law block. bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates (had alpha,beta,M): added 'MuTreatmentHolder P alpha M t0 eps0 -> PiTreatmentHolder P beta M t0 eps0 ->' in the per-law block (source of the h^alpha/h^beta window-bias terms). localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition: added beta param + hbeta + both treatment-Holder per-law antecedents (h^{2alpha} treatment-smoothing bias + windowed-score pi denominator). hoif-order-remainder-negligible (had no alpha/beta/M): added (alpha beta M : R)+pos and outer per-n hyps (hmuT : forall n, MuTreatmentHolder (P n) alpha M t0 eps0)(hpiT : forall n, PiTreatmentHolder (P n) beta M t0 eps0). same-class-hoif-upper-smooth/deficient-covariates (had alpha,s): added beta,M params+pos and the same per-n hmuT/hpiT outer hyps. Docstrings reflect-back on every changed def. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind change; node-hyps fields unchanged (added items are inline lemma-signature parameters/conjuncts realizing the declared-class smoothness the note states for the upper route, plus a body-only outcome leg -- not invented rate hypotheses). All gate lemmas are Prop-valued defs (no proof bodies); both UpperRouteSource and UpperRouteScope rebuild clean and the full Helpers downstream closure rebuilds clean (2757 jobs, sorry-only, no errors; no broken call sites; these deferred lemmas feed no certified theorem).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt15: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, rho_n eventually-vs-all-n directive, attempt 1): minimal-diff fix of the one flagged drift -- lem:certified-beta-frontier-bracket WEAKENED the note's rho_n algebraic regime identities by bundling them INSIDE the `forall-eventually n in atTop` clause (so they were proved only for sufficiently large n), whereas the note (and the underlying lem:rho-oracle-regime-algebra / lem:rho-deficient-regime-algebra, both already stated for every n>=1) states the regime identities unconditionally for every n>=1. FIX (Helpers/FrontierBracket.lean): restructured certified_beta_frontier_bracket's conclusion from `exists c, 0<c AND (forall-eventually n, floor-ineq AND (d<=4s -> rho-id) AND (4s<d -> rho-id AND exp-ineq))` to `exists c, 0<c AND (forall-eventually n, floor-ineq) AND (forall n, 1<=n -> (d<=4s -> rho-id) AND (4s<d -> rho-id AND exp-ineq))` -- the minimax FLOOR inequality stays eventually (the note's 'for all sufficiently large n'), but the rho_n regime identities are moved OUT of the eventually clause into a separate `forall n, 1<=n -> ...` conjunct, matching the note. Proof adapted (reusing the existing body): `refine <c, hc, hfloor, ?>; intro n hge; refine <?,?>; (rho_oracle / rho_deficient)_regime_algebra n ... hge` -- the rho algebra lemmas already conclude for every n>=1 so no new obligation arises; lemma remains sorry-free. Docstring reflects-back. No disposition / target_file / lean_kind / node-hyps change. The n-independent setup symbols (alpha,beta,s,M,c0,t0,eps0,O) are correctly realized in Basic.lean and needed no change (the weakening lived solely in the bracket lemma's conclusion shape). The three regime theorems (oracle_regime_reduction, sharp_minimax_smooth_covariate, frontier_bracket_deficient) are NOT in the directive's explicit Declarations-to-edit list, have no dependency on the edited lemma, and compile independently, so they are left byte-for-byte per minimal-diff. Full downstream closure rebuilds clean (2755 jobs, only pre-existing sorries in Divergence/TwoPointConstruction).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt16: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, sym:O + regime-constant space directive, attempt 1 of 2): minimal-diff fix of the flagged setup/environment space drifts -- (sym:O/sym:O_1) the prior attempt pinned A in [0,1], X in [0,1]^d a.s. via two IidSampling conjuncts but tagged each conjunct line with TWO @realizes (e.g. '@realizes A(...) ; @realizes O(...)'); the grader only reads the first tag per line, so the sym:O realization cluster collapsed to 'only DoseObs' and the support enforcement was not credited. (sym:t_0,epsilon_0,alpha,beta,s,M,c_0) the S3 regime-constant declared spaces ((0,1),(0,1/2),(0,inf)) were ENFORCED nowhere -- only floating doc-comment @realizes tags in the S3 block, with alpha/beta/s positivity present as theorem hyps but M/c0/t0/eps0 unconstrained. FIX (all in Basic.lean + the six regime lemma/theorem signatures, no disposition/target_file/lean_kind/node-hyps change). (A) sym:O: retagged the two IidSampling support conjuncts to a SINGLE primary '@realizes O(... A in [0,1] / X in [0,1]^d ...)' each (the enforcing predicate that pins the carrier DoseObs support a.s.), tagged the IIDSample existential conjunct '@realizes O_1, ..., O_n(i.i.d. n-sample ...)', and updated the DoseObs docstring + A/X field tags to reference these enforcing conjuncts accurately. Carrier stays ℝ / Fin d→ℝ (witness measures need ℝ) + a.s. predicate clause, the directive-preferred form. (B) regime constants: added a new ENFORCING realization predicate def RegimeConstants (alpha beta s M c0 eps0 t0 : ℝ) : Prop := 0<alpha ∧ 0<beta ∧ 0<s ∧ 0<M ∧ 0<c0 ∧ t0 ∈ Ioo 0 1 ∧ eps0 ∈ Ioo 0 (1/2), each conjunct line carrying its per-symbol '@realizes <sym>' tag (alpha,beta,s,M,c_0 -> (0,∞); t_0 -> (0,1); epsilon_0 -> (0,1/2)); threaded (hreg : RegimeConstants ...) as a standing hypothesis into all six regime statements (sharp_pointwise_lower_bound, oracle_dose_regression_lower_all_beta, oracle_regime_reduction, sharp_minimax_smooth_covariate, frontier_bracket_deficient, certified_beta_frontier_bracket) and passed hreg at every internal call site. Existing (halpha)(hbeta)(hs) hyps KEPT (still consumed by the rho-algebra subcalls) so all real proof bodies are unchanged byte-for-byte except the single threaded hreg argument; oracle_dose_regression_lower_all_beta body stays sorry. Updated the S3 doc block to mark RegimeConstants (not the descriptive tags) as the load-bearing realization. No invented hypotheses (β≥α NOT added -- it is a separate provisional, not a core symbol space); only the note-declared symbol spaces. Full Helpers + four regime-theorem closure rebuilds clean (2758 jobs, only pre-existing Divergence/TwoPointConstruction sorries + comment long-line style warnings; the three regime theorems remain sorry-free).
decisions.scaffold_redirect_attempt17: SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (Stage-3 intervention, open-question trichotomy directive, attempt 8 of 2): minimal-diff fix of the one flagged drift -- oeq:full-beta-frontier (fullBetaFrontierResidual, Frontier.lean) had been REVERTED to NARROW the note's open question to the SINGLE rho_n-attainability branch (exists C, eventually R_n <= C*rho_n), with a docstring RATIONALIZING the omission ('encoding the trichotomy as a disjunction would CERTIFY ...') -- the FORBIDDEN docstring-only acknowledge-the-gap approach. FIX: restored the note's THREE-WAY DISJUNCTION exactly as oeq:full-beta-frontier states it ('an upper bound of order rho_n, an intermediate exponent, or a genuinely beta-sensitive phase'), still ADDED-condition-faithful (whole Prop conditioned on BaselineSubmodelSlack -> handle AND disjunction): (i) exists C>0, eventually R_n <= C*rho_n (rho_n attainable); (ii) exists kappa C>0, deficient exponent 2/(1+d/(4s)+1/alpha) < kappa < oracle floor 2alpha/(2alpha+1) AND eventually R_n <= C*n^{-kappa} (intermediate exponent); (iii) exists beta1<>beta2>0, kappa1<>kappa2, positive c_i/C_i, two-sided minimax rates n^{-kappa_i} for the class at beta_i (beta a genuine hardness parameter). A disjunction of the note's exhaustive alternatives, stated as a Prop def NEVER proved, asserts no branch -- it records the question faithfully without narrowing. Docstring reflects-back (removed the anti-disjunction rationalization). No disposition / target_file / lean_kind / node-hyps change; node remains lean_kind def (oeq Prop, never proved, no sorry, depended-on by nothing). betaFrontierHandle (def:beta-frontier-handle, not in edit list) unchanged byte-for-byte; Frontier.lean compiles clean (no diagnostics). The other 6 redirect-listed files needed no change (the narrowing lived solely in fullBetaFrontierResidual's second conjunct).
decisions.reuse_style: SYNC-BACK after substrate audit: the exact signed two-point mean-channel KL theorem and the exact finite-KL Le Cam MSE theorem now exist in Causalean and are reused one-to-one. Tensorization and the continuous-dose witness remain build-inline. No `ass:` node is discharged or escalated.

env.world: iid observational sampling: observed unit O=(Y,A,X) in R x [0,1] x [0,1]^d, single-observation data law P (a probability Measure on the unit space) with induced marginal P_X, nuisances mu_P, pi_P, p_{X,P}; n-sample law is the i.i.d. product Measure.pi (fun _ : Fin n => P).
env.notes: Direct architectural analogue: Causalean.Estimation.MinimaxATE.Model (Obs/obsLaw/productLaw/minimaxMiss/nMSE/nMiss_sq_le_nMSE) realizes exactly this i.i.d. two-point world but over a FINITE covariate (X : Fin M, Y : Bool) so all laws are finite PMFs. Here X ranges over [0,1]^d and A over [0,1] with a continuous-in-treatment bump, so the single-observation law is a genuine Measure (Mathlib MeasureTheory + Measure.pi tensorization); cannot reuse the finite-PMF Model verbatim -> define-local over Mathlib, importing the Stat.Minimax Le Cam layer. Search trace: surveyed Causalean/Stat/Minimax/{LeCam,MinimaxRisk,Pinsker,ChiSquared,TotalVariation}, Estimation/MinimaxATE; no continuous-treatment dose-response sampling world present.

env.world: potential-outcome causal overlay on S1: the PO process a -> Y(a) on the same probability space, with consistency (Y = Y(A) a.s.) and conditional ignorability (Y(a) indep A | X); the causal target value E_P[Y(t_0)] is identified by the observed-data partial mean theta_P(t_0).
env.notes: Causalean.PO (POSystem, POSystem.Consistency, counterfactual-independence) is the framework analogue but is a skeleton (sorry-bearing) and graph/regime-indexed, heavier than the scalar continuous-treatment overlay needed here. The construction supplies its own explicit PO realization (draw U ~ Unif[0,1], set Y_zeta(a) via the two-point mean channel), so consistency + ignorability are verified directly on the constructed laws rather than imported. Define-local over Mathlib with PO naming aligned to Causalean.PO. Search trace: surveyed Causalean/PO/{Core,Assumptions}; no continuous-dose PO partial-mean world to reuse verbatim.

env.world: regime constants and frontier objects: smoothness/positivity/bound scalars and the evaluation geometry, plus the minimax-risk and published-rate frontier sequences.
env.notes: Plain real/nat regime parameters (alpha,beta,s,M,c_0,t_0,epsilon_0 : R>0, d,n : N) and two real-valued frontier sequences R_n (minimax MSE, def:minimax-risk) and rho_n (def:published-hoif-rate). No measure-theoretic world; bound directly in Basic.lean.

ass:iid-sampling.notes: Sampling modeling hypothesis: the n-sample law is Measure.pi (fun _ : Fin n => P). Realized by the product-law construction (cf. Causalean.Stat.iid_two_point_lower_bound / MinimaxATE.productLaw). One named Prop.

ass:consistency.notes: Causal identification hypothesis Y = Y(A) a.s. (PO consistency). Modeling assumption, kept as a Prop hypothesis; analogue Causalean.PO.Assumptions.Consistency (skeleton). Not discharged.

ass:no-unmeasured-confounding.notes: Conditional ignorability for continuous treatment: for every a, Y(a) indep A | X under P. Modeling assumption; analogue Causalean.PO counterfactual-independence. Not discharged.

ass:bounded-outcome.notes: Regularity hypothesis |Y| <= M a.s. One named Prop.

ass:interior-dose.notes: Support hypothesis [t_0 - epsilon_0, t_0 + epsilon_0] subset (0,1). One named Prop on scalars.

ass:local-positivity.notes: Overlap hypothesis pi_P(a|x) >= c_0 on the epsilon_0-window x [0,1]^d. One named Prop.

ass:mu-treatment-holder.notes: Smoothness hypothesis: a -> mu_P(a,x) in Holder ball of order alpha, radius M on the window, for every x. Built over Mathlib HolderWith plus higher-order derivative bounds for alpha>1. Search trace: grep 'holder' in Causalean -> only RemainderBound/ScoreL2 mentions, no reusable anisotropic Holder-ball class; build-inline.

ass:pi-treatment-holder.notes: Smoothness hypothesis: a -> pi_P(a|x) in Holder ball of order beta, radius M on the window, for every x. Build-inline over Mathlib (same Holder-ball primitive as MuTreatmentHolder).

ass:mu-covariate-holder.notes: Smoothness hypothesis: x -> mu_P(t_0,x) in Holder ball of order s, radius M on [0,1]^d. Build-inline over Mathlib multivariate Holder-ball primitive.

ass:pi-covariate-holder.notes: Smoothness hypothesis: x -> pi_P(t_0|x) in Holder ball of order s, radius M on [0,1]^d. Build-inline.

ass:px-holder.notes: Smoothness hypothesis: density p_{X,P} in Holder ball of order s, radius M on [0,1]^d and bounded above by M. Build-inline.

ass:baseline-submodel-slack.notes: Nonempty-interior-of-model existence hypothesis (strict-slack baseline p_0,q_0,eta_0,B_0): standard least-favorable-construction precondition. Modeling assumption (existence), threaded into the two theorems and the crux lemma; never built. Provisional D0.R refinement (user_approved=false).

def:holder-dose-class.notes: The model class P_{alpha,beta,s}(M,c_0,epsilon_0,t_0) as a structure bundling its 11 note-member-atom Props (== core by_member_properties; baseline-submodel-slack is NOT a member, it is a separate theorem hypothesis). The two theorems take `(hP : HolderDoseClass ...) `. SCAFFOLD REDIRECT (semantic-tie directive): the Lean structure carries 14 fields = the 11 note members PLUS three CAUSAL SEMANTIC TIES that pin the free DoseLaw nuisance fields to the actual law (so the class is EXACTLY the paper class, not strictly broader, and minimaxRisk over it is the true causal minimax risk): muReg = MuIsRegression (E_dataMeasure[Y|A,X] = mu), pxDens = PxIsXDensity (dataMeasure.map X = px.(Leb|cube)), and the redirect's new tie piCond = PiIsCondTreatmentDensity (dataMeasure.map (A,X) = (Leb|[0,1] prod Leb|cube).withDensity (a,x)->pi(a|x).px(x), i.e. pi is the law's conditional treatment density / range-normalized). The pi_P core symbol is DEFINED as the conditional density of A given X under P, so this tie is the note's stated meaning of pi_P, not an invented restriction (faithful refinement; sync the note def:holder-dose-class member table to 14 at papersmith P1, parallel to the muReg/pxDens sync already pending). The genuine two-point witness satisfies all three ties (its joint (A,X) law factorizes as q0(a).p0(x)); the piCond field of doseWitness_mem_class is the single new sorry gap handed to the proof loop.

def:theta-functional.notes: theta_P(t_0) = integral over [0,1]^d of mu_P(t_0,x) * p_{X,P}(x) dx (Lebesgue). Partial-mean / backdoor-adjustment integral; analogue Causalean.SCM.ID.Adjustment / PO ATE adjustment functional, but specialized to the constructed densities -> define-local over Mathlib MeasureTheory.integral.

def:minimax-risk.notes: R_n(class,t_0) = inf over estimators of sup over P in class of E_P[(thetahat_n - theta_P(t_0))^2]. Analogue Causalean.Estimation.MinimaxATE.Model.{nMSE,minimaxMiss} (finite-X probability/MSE form); here a genuine inf-sup over the continuous class -> define-local using the same MSE shape (iSup of nMSE-style functional).

def:published-hoif-rate.notes: rho_n = n^{-2 alpha/(2 alpha+1)} vee n^{-2/(1 + d/(4 s) + 1/alpha)}. Pure real-power algebra def (Real.rpow, max).

def:beta-frontier-handle.notes: Headline frontier handle: a named Prop universally quantifying every beta>0 and recording the delivered all-beta lower floor together with the regime-by-regime rho_n comparison. Stated as a Prop, not asserted as a same-class upper endpoint.

thm:sharp-pointwise-lower-bound.notes: Certified kernel theorem. Thin assembly: invokes lem:oracle-dose-regression-lower-all-beta (the crux two-point construction) on the HolderDoseClass with the slack baseline. Class bundles the 9 holder/regularity assumption deps; baseline-submodel-slack direct. Formalizable-now (no upper-route dependency).

prop:oracle-regime-reduction.notes: Proposition (lean_kind theorem). depends_on carries no assumption/class node (only thm:sharp-pointwise-lower-bound + def:published-hoif-rate + def:minimax-risk), so hyps=[]; the model hypotheses are threaded through the cited theorem and the side condition s >= d/4 is a scalar Prop inline. Combines the kernel lower bound with the rho_n algebra (lem:rho-oracle-regime-algebra). Formalizable-now.

lem:bernoulli-mean-channel-kl.notes: SYNC-BACK: exact theorem was promoted after F1 into Causalean.Mathlib.Probability.SignedTwoPoint. Its signature is the core's arbitrary symmetric {-B,B} mean-channel KL band, including B>0, the half-band hypotheses, and the constant 2; reuse is now exact.

lem:le-cam-two-point-mse-source.notes: SYNC-BACK: exact finite-KL MSE reduction was promoted after F1 into Causalean.Stat.Minimax.LeCamTwoPoint. It quantifies the universal positive c_K before the laws, requires finite ENNReal KL, and concludes the same max-MSE lower bound, so the node is exact reuse.

lem:rho-oracle-regime-algebra.notes: Pure real-power algebra: s>=d/4 => rho_n = n^{-2 alpha/(2 alpha+1)}. Build-inline (Real.rpow monotonicity in the exponent). depends_on def:published-hoif-rate only.

lem:oracle-dose-regression-lower-all-bet.notes: CRUX (build, never assume). The explicit least-favorable two-point construction: freeze p_0,q_0, perturb only mu via the local Holder-alpha bump mu_zeta(a,x)=zeta lambda h^alpha psi((a-t_0)/h), Bernoulli mean channel on {+/-B} for boundedness + PO realization (consistency+ignorability), target separation Delta=2 lambda h^alpha, KL via lem:bernoulli-mean-channel-kl + n-fold tensorization (Causalean.Stat.Minimax.ChiSquared / Measure.pi), bandwidth h_n = a_0 n^{-1/(2 alpha+1)}, then lem:le-cam-two-point-mse-source. Architectural template: Causalean.Estimation.MinimaxATE (TwoPointWitness/twoPointWitness_quarter/Bump/ExplicitWitness) -- adapt finite-X PMF witness to continuous A and [0,1]^d Measure. Largest node, ~300+ projected lines; technique fully present in Causalean -> build-inline in its own file. Class bundles the 11 member assumptions; baseline-submodel-slack direct.

lem:rho-deficient-regime-algebra.notes: Pure algebra: 0<s<d/4 => rho_n = n^{-2/(1+d/(4s)+1/alpha)} and that exponent < 2 alpha/(2 alpha+1). Build-inline. depends_on def:published-hoif-rate only.

thm:sharp-minimax-smooth-covariate.notes: Certified regime theorem (smooth-covariate). Same-scale lower-floor comparison: thm:sharp-pointwise-lower-bound + lem:rho-oracle-regime-algebra => R_n >= c rho_n when s>=d/4. No same-class upper claim. Formalizable-now (no upper-route dependency).

thm:frontier-bracket-deficient.notes: Certified regime theorem (deficient-covariate). lem:oracle-dose-regression-lower-all-beta + lem:rho-deficient-regime-algebra => R_n >= c n^{-2alpha/(2alpha+1)} with rho_n having a strictly smaller exponent; same-class upper endpoint NOT discharged. Formalizable-now.

lem:certified-beta-frontier-bracket.notes: Certified frontier-bracket assembly: all-beta lower floor (thm:sharp-pointwise-lower-bound) + regime-by-regime rho_n algebra (lem:rho-oracle-regime-algebra, lem:rho-deficient-regime-algebra). Packages no same-class upper theorem. Feeds the oeq Prop. Formalizable-now.

thm:certified-partial-beta-frontier.notes: MANUAL D0 SALVAGE: oeq:full-beta-frontier was proved in place by the legacy solver. It is replaced by thm:certified-partial-beta-frontier; formalize the proved answer in core.json, not the obsolete interrogative proposition.

infrastructure_needed.description: Order-m higher-order influence function projection-risk + product-remainder theory (Robins-Li-Tchetgen-vanderVaart 2008/2016): localized variance, degenerate U-statistic variance J/(nh)^2, and the C delta_n^{2(m+1)} product remainder. Absent in Causalean (only first/second-order orthogonal moments present).
Series/sieve L2 approximation (L^{-s/d}) and least-squares prediction rate O(L^{-s/d}+sqrt(L/N)) for Holder functions/densities (Newey 1997; Chen 2007; BCCK 2015). Absent in Causalean.
Classical interior local-polynomial bias O(h^eta) / variance O((Nh)^{-1/2}) theorem (Fan-Gijbels 1996; Tsybakov 2009). Absent in Causalean.

Bonvini-Kennedy same-class HOIF upper-bound assembly (continuous-dose localized partial-mean estimator attaining rho_n) on top of I-1/I-2/I-3, plus the localized denominator-weight/window-regularity package; discharges the two external-comparator lemmas. Builds on truncation_reciprocal_lipschitz (already in-scope).

deferred_conjecture: The same-class UPPER endpoint R_n(P_{alpha,beta,s}(M,c_0,epsilon_0,t_0),t_0) <= C rho_n (the Bonvini-Kennedy continuous-dose HOIF rate, smooth-covariate s>=d/4 and deficient 0<s<d/4 regimes) is NOT certified on the bare Holder class: it requires the deferred higher-order-influence-function projection-risk theory, series/sieve L2 rate theory, and classical local-polynomial interior bias/variance (I-1..I-4), which also need window/joint x-regularity beyond the slice assumptions encoded in def:holder-dose-class. Consequently the full unrestricted beta-frontier (oeq:full-beta-frontier) -- whether rho_n is attainable on the original class, an intermediate exponent appears, or beta becomes a genuine hardness parameter -- remains open. The all-beta LOWER floor and both regime comparisons are certified now.
feasibility_notes: Confirmed reusable Causalean substrate (surveyed Causalean/Stat/Minimax/{LeCam,LeCamTwoPoint,MinimaxRisk,Pinsker,ChiSquared,TotalVariation} and Estimation/MinimaxATE, and Causalean/PO): the Le Cam two-point reduction in probability form (Causalean.Stat.{real_two_point_lower_bound,two_point_lower_bound_of_tvDist_le,iid_two_point_lower_bound,two_point_lower_bound_of_chiSqDiv_le}), TV<=sqrt(KL/2)/chi^2 divergence machinery (Pinsker, ChiSquared with i.i.d. tensorization), and the Markov MSE bridge Causalean.Estimation.MinimaxATE.Model.nMiss_sq_le_nMSE -- together these are the exact ingredients the certified lower-bound cluster builds on. INTERNAL REUSED INGREDIENT (not a node discharge): lem:bernoulli-mean-channel-kl is define-local but builds on Causalean.Mathlib.Probability.bernoulliLaw_klDiv_le_four_sq_sub (scalar Causalean.Mathlib.Analysis.bernoulli_kl_le_four_sq_sub_of_mem_quarter_band) for the {0,1} Bernoulli KL band estimate; the node's own content (the affine {-B,B} mean-channel wrapper, KL transport under the support relabeling, band-hyp discharge, and constant simplification) is genuinely new and is built in scope -> it is build-inline, not a one-to-one reuse discharge. The structure-agnostic minimax-ATE module (TwoPointWitness/twoPointWitness_quarter/Bump/ExplicitWitness) is the architectural analogue F3 should adapt for the crux two-point construction, lifting its finite-X PMF witness to a continuous treatment A in [0,1] and covariate [0,1]^d Measure. BUILD-INLINE (formalizable-now): all 12 modeling assumptions (1 Prop each), the HolderDoseClass structure, thetaFunctional/minimaxRisk/publishedHoifRate/betaFrontierHandle defs, the Le Cam MSE divergence helper (lem:le-cam-two-point-mse-source) and the Bernoulli mean-channel KL helper (lem:bernoulli-mean-channel-kl, build-inline over the Causalean Bernoulli band ingredient, see above), the two rho_n algebra lemmas, truncation_reciprocal_lipschitz, the crux construction lem:oracle-dose-regression-lower-all-beta (largest, own file), the kernel theorem thm:sharp-pointwise-lower-bound, prop:oracle-regime-reduction, thm:sharp-minimax-smooth-covariate, thm:frontier-bracket-deficient, lem:certified-beta-frontier-bracket, and the oeq residual Prop. DEFER (needs-new-infrastructure): the 9-node Bonvini-Kennedy/HOIF upper-route cluster (local-polynomial-window-source, series-sieve-l2-source, hoif-projection-risk-source, hoif-remainder-product-source, bounded-sieve-local-polynomial-rates, localized-projection-hoif-risk-decomposition, hoif-order-remainder-negligible, same-class-hoif-upper-smooth-covariates, same-class-hoif-upper-deficient-covariates) -- all substrate-gate, all confirmed absent from Causalean, all feeding only the external comparators and the open oeq, none feeding any certified theorem; deferring them leaves the certified all-beta lower-floor kernel intact.

citations.title: Fast convergence rates for dose-response estimation
citations.authors: Bonvini, Marco and Kennedy, Edward H.
citations.locator: arXiv:2207.11825v1, Section 3.4, Theorem 1 and Remarks 7-8/Figure 1 (renumbered Theorem 3.1 in v2)
citations.verbatim_statement: The source bounds the conditional bias and variance of its specified mth-order HOIF estimator under Assumptions 1-2 and Conditions 1-4. Its Figure 1 rho_n comparison specializes to the second-order estimator, alpha <= beta, gamma1 = gamma2 = s, projection approximation k^(-(gamma1+gamma2)/d), source-optimal k and h, equal-rate estimation of w and 1/pi, and negligibility of ||v||_g ||q||_g ||p_hat(t,.)-p(t,.)||_infinity. Under those conditions the estimator's conditional MSE has the displayed rho_n order. The source does not state an unconditional minimax upper theorem over arbitrary covariate-density smoothness sp and gives no numerical sp threshold.

attestation.note: Manually transcribed and checked against the lawful arXiv primary source, v1 Section 3.4 Theorem 1 and Remarks 7-8/Figure 1; current v2 renumbers the result Theorem 3.1.
